Description: Store Locator page loads without error
Preconditions: Store Locator URL accessible for the brand
Steps: 1. Navigate to store locator URL (brand-specific path)
Expected Result: Page heading visible; search input visible; no broken layout.
Notes: Platypus has no store locator — validated in ST-pla-001

Description: Searching by AU suburb returns nearby store results
Steps: 1. Open store locator 2. Enter 'Melbourne' 3. Submit search
Expected Result: At least one store result card appears in the list.

Description: Searching by AU postcode returns nearby store results
Steps: 1. Open store locator 2. Enter '3000' 3. Submit search
Expected Result: At least one store result card appears in the list.

Description: Searching by NZ suburb/postcode returns nearby store results
Steps: 1. Open store locator 2. Enter 'Auckland' or '1010' 3. Submit search
Expected Result: At least one store result card appears in the list.

Description: Store result card shows name + address + trading hours
Steps: 1. Search valid location 2. Inspect first store card
Expected Result: Store name + full address + trading hours all visible and non-empty.

Description: Google Maps visible and store pins displayed after search
Steps: 1. Open store locator 2. Search valid location 3. Observe map
Expected Result: Map renders; at least one pin visible on the map.
Notes: Map loads Google Maps API — failures here indicate a Maps key/network issue

Description: No-result state shown for an unsupported or non-existent location
Expected Result: No-result message shown; no store cards; page does not break.

Description: Get Directions link is present in store result and opens a map/navigation target
Preconditions: Store search returned results; Google Maps link expected
Steps: 1. Search valid location 2. Inspect first store result for Get Directions link
Expected Result: Get Directions link visible; href contains maps.google.com or similar map service URL.
Notes: Do NOT auto-click — verify href is present to avoid triggering external navigation

Description: Store Locator entry point visible in site footer or navigation
Steps: 1. Open any page 2. Look in footer and/or navigation for Store Locator link

Description: Search input field is visible on Store Locator page load
Steps: 1. Open store locator 2. Inspect page before any search
Expected Result: Search input and submit button visible.

Description: 'Use Current Location' button is visible on Store Locator
Steps: 1. Open store locator 2. Inspect geolocation control
Expected Result: Use Current Location button (or similar) is visible.

Description: Denying geolocation permission shows a graceful fallback message
Preconditions: Store Locator page loaded; browser geolocation blocked
Steps: 1. Click Use Current Location 2. Deny permission in browser dialog
Expected Result: User-friendly message shown; manual search input remains functional.

Description: Clicking a map pin shows store info popup or highlights the store in the list
Preconditions: Store search returned results; map visible with pins
Steps: 1. Search valid location 2. Click a map pin
Expected Result: Store info popup or tooltip opens on the map OR corresponding store in list is highlighted.

Description: Platypus site does NOT have a store locator page
Steps: 1. Open Platypus site 2. Inspect footer and navigation for store locator link 3. Attempt to navigate to /stores or /store-locator
Expected Result: No store locator link present in nav/footer; /stores or /store-locator URL returns 404 or redirects.
Notes: Platypus has no physical stores — store locator is absent per site-structure.md
